# oodle_notifiers (Data Source)

Lists all notifiers.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "oodle_notifiers" "all" {}

output "notifiers" {
  value = data.oodle_notifiers.all.notifiers
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `notifiers` (Attributes List) List of notifiers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notifiers))

<a id="nestedatt--notifiers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notifiers`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The ID of the notifier.
- `name` (String) The name of the notifier.
- `type` (String) The type of the notifier (e.g. email, pagerduty, slack, opsgenie, webhook, googlechat).
